_comment:
The command's stdout should be forgiving 'key: value' or 'key:value' lines, e.g.:
  last_business_day: 2026-07-03
  current_session: closed
  next_transition: opens @ 2026-07-07T13:30:00Z
Each line is parsed and re-printed verbatim (unrecognized lines are passed through as-is) under the 'Project calendar (authoritative)' section. If the command is missing, non-zero-exits, or prints nothing, datetime-sync prints a one-line failure note and continues — it never blocks the session.
